@@ -8,6 +8,7 @@
 
 ### Fixed
 
+- Keep: use `keep.readonly` scope (service account). (#64) — thanks @jeremys.
 - Sheets: `gog auth add --services sheets --readonly` now includes Drive read-only scope so `gog sheets export` works. (#62)
 
 ### Tests

@@ -242,7 +242,7 @@ Service scope matrix (auto-generated; run `go run scripts/gen-auth-services-md.g | sheets | yes | Sheets API, Drive API | `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive`
`https://www.googleapis.com/auth/spreadsheets` | Export via Drive | | people | yes | People API | `profile` | OIDC profile scope | | groups | no | Cloud Identity API | `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-identity.groups.readonly` | Workspace only | -| keep | no | Keep API | `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/keep` | Workspace only; service account (domain-wide delegation) | +| keep | no | Keep API | `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/keep.readonly` | Workspace only; service account (domain-wide delegation) | ### Service Accounts (Workspace only)
